response.overview: Police arrest former lover 'Arvind' of a prostitute 'Shweta' for her murder . The police are suspicious of Arvind but have no evidence to support it. After getting beaten up by the police, Arvind reveals shocking details about her friend 'Mahesh' and Shweta's husband 'Sandesh' which leads the police down a rabbit hole and a carefully constructed dead ends by someone.
response.title: tt21741518
